title: Eva Unit 01 from lillith
wikitext:
[]: Eva Unit-01 from lillith?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Feb 11, 2009 1:20 pm This was one thing that always confused me... Unit 00, and Units 02 through the MP Evas are clones of Adam but Unit-01 came from Lillith. How did this happen?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Feb 11, 2009 1:38 pm http://www.evamonkey.com/test_type/testtype02.jpg http://www.evamonkey.com/test_type/testtype03.jpg http://www.evamonkey.com/test_type/testtype04.jpg http://www.evamonkey.com/test_type/testtype05.jpg http://www.evamonkey.com/test_type/testtype07.jpg As seen in the Test Type Intro and the video/director's version of episode 23. Anyone have Nephilim's fan art version of this handy? While Unit 01 was very definitely created from Lilith, it's kind of vague how the others were "grown". It has been suggested in the past, though not corroborated (to my knowledge) that Unit 02 was grown from Adam, based upon the facts that Adam was in Germany where Unit 02 was built, and the fact that Eva Unit 02 has Blue blood, and the Angels' blood types are... well, you know the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed Feb 11, 2009 2:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Anyone have Nephilim's fan art version of this handy?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 11, 2009 2:21 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It has been suggested in the past, though not corroborated (to my knowledge) that Unit 02 was grown from Adam, based upon the facts that Adam was in Germany where Unit 02 was built, and the fact that Eva Unit 02 has Blue blood, and the Angels' blood types are... well, you know the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Feb 11, 2009 3:21 pm Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: It has been suggested in the past, though not corroborated (to my knowledge) that Unit 02 was grown from Adam, based upon the facts that Adam was in Germany where Unit 02 was built, and the fact that Eva Unit 02 has Blue blood, and the Angels' blood types are... well, you know the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 11, 2009 5:37 pm For the record, I still feel that something close Reichu's original suggestion -- EVA-01 being Adamic material planted/layered/grafted into Lilith's body, there to be nurtured -- provides the necessary consistency behind the various remarks, Kaworu's in particular, about the nature of the EVAs as something intrinsically hateful and alien to humans.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 11, 2009 5:47 pm @Monkey: Zeruel, and Ramiel (I'm not even talking Rebuild here), and Leliel, and Armisael, and Arael, and (arguably...?) Bardiel. To be precise. GNR was also "blood type blue" and had red blood. So, yes... Whatever suggestion you heard that tried to make a connection between "blood type: blue" and Eva-02's indigo-colored blood ... failed epicly. @Mr. Tines: I originally came up with the "Lilith as surrogate mother" theory in order to reconcile several inconsistencies, including Kaworu's comments on Evas. External sources (like the EOE program and Chronicle) don't seem to much question the concept that Eva-01 is some kind of "Lilith copy", but they don't really address the incongruities between Eva-01 and Lilith, either. I think the "surrogate mom" fanwank, which requires the perhaps precarious action of handwaving "bunshin" into something a little less than a "copy", is overall much simpler than dealing with the "why Eva-01 and Lilith don't look anything alike, and etc. etc." business. But that's just me.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Feb 11, 2009 5:55 pm "Surrogate mother" makes all kinds of sense given the graphic. Also explains why 01 still uses a core (and might be relevant to how it incorporates an S2, or even might need/want one).
